title: SGV-006 Forbidden care Emika Sakuragi
overview: Underwear model'Emika'visited her father-in-law's'Toneji''s house with her husband. Toneji, who should have needed long-term care, was certainly weak, but when he was cared for by Emika, who has an outstanding style, he immediately became well. Furthermore, when Emika walks and is overwhelmed by her sex appeal, she forgets herself and jumps at Emika's beautiful body.
